claims.quote: Visiting Student Clerkships
claims.claimText: MD Program navigation lists a 'Visiting Student Clerkships' section; no eligibility, application, cost, or duration details on this page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Navigation reference to Visiting Student Clerkships is a Tier 1 USCE signal but page provides no substantive details — must follow up on dedicated VS page.

claims.quote: MD students have access to research opportunities through partnerships with institutions such as the USC Norris Comprehensive Cancer Center, the USC Mark and Mary Stevens Neuroimaging and Informatics Institute, the Broad Center for Regenerative Medicine and Stem Cell Research, and many more.
claims.claimText: Research opportunities described for Keck MD students through USC institutional partnerships; audience is Keck's own MD students, not external visitors.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Research opportunities for MD students are Tier 1 research-elective adjacent, but quote scopes to Keck's own MD students, not visiting/external eligibility.
claims.limitations: Audience explicitly is Keck's own MD students; no statement of external/visiting access.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.claimText: Senior students in good standing at LCME/COCA US medical schools may apply for clerkships up to 8 weeks.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Defines eligibility for visiting medical students — Tier 1 USCE eligibility statement.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof
